name: Pistachio Pudding Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 2 (3-3/4 oz) boxes of instant pistachio pudding according to package directions using 3 cups of milk.
2. Place half the ladyfingers in the bottom of a 9-inch X 13-inch glass dish.
3. Add half the pudding and half the Cool Whip on top of the ladyfingers.
4. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
5. Crumble 3-4 Heath candy bars over the top layer.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
